title: Counterfeit Detection Result (Counterfeit Vision -> Command Centre)
description: Output emitted by the Counterfeit Vision CV model (Adharshan) for a single note image. The command centre consumes this to render the note-scan card and feed the fusion LLM.

event_id.description: Unique id for this scanned note.

missing_features.description: Security features found absent/failed (feature-level detection). Powers the 'why fake' explanation.

image_ref.description: Path/URL to the captured note image for the UI.

heatmap_ref.description: Path/URL to the Grad-CAM heatmap overlay image — highlights which regions drove the fake/genuine decision.

location_hint.description: Optional seizure location for the crime map (cross-domain overlap).

triage.description: Pre-CNN deterministic triage. decision 'obvious_fake' or 'unscannable' means the CNN was never consulted — the verdict came from these measurements alone. Additive evidence like fraud-shield's `verification`; never contradicts the pipeline.

narrative.description: LLM-written 'why' over the failed checks (Claude -> Groq -> Gemini -> template chain). Null when triage passed.

serial.description: Serial-number layer (manual/UI-entered serial). nonsense = impossible RBI format; suspicious = classic prop pattern (fancy genuine numbers exist); duplicate = same serial sighted before in the registry — a counterfeit printing run or a rescan. Any non-valid status blocks a genuine certification (caps to uncertain), never convicts.

vision_review.description: Vision-LLM second look (portrait / SPECIMEN overprint / header text). Additive: absent without an API key; a failing question blocks a genuine certification, never produces a fake verdict.
